# Kansai Karate Gold Coast — AI-readable business summary
# https://www.kansaikarategoldcoast.com.au

## About
Kansai Karate Gold Coast is a traditional Japanese karate school located at
Unit 3/2 Sierra Place, Upper Coomera QLD 4209, Australia. The school is led by
Sensei Michael Hunt (4th Dan Shitoryu Shukokai), who has been teaching for over
two decades. A licensed dojo of Kansai Karate Academy, affiliated with the
Queensland Karate Association (QKA) and the Australian Karate Federation (AKF).
Operating since April 2013 with approximately 188 active students.

## Contact
Phone: 0489 265 960
Email: info@kansaikarategoldcoast.com.au
Address: Unit 3/2 Sierra Place, Upper Coomera QLD 4209
Website: https://www.kansaikarategoldcoast.com.au

## Programs
Cubs (Ages 3-4): Introductory karate for toddlers and preschoolers.
Little Lions (Ages 5-7): Foundational karate for early primary school children.
Juniors Beginners (Ages 8-12): Entry-level karate for primary school children.
Juniors Intermediate/Advanced (Ages 8-12): Ongoing development for graded students.
Teens Karate (Ages 13-18): Structured karate designed specifically for teenagers.
Adult Karate (Ages 18+): Traditional karate for adults of all fitness levels.

## Class Schedule (Upper Coomera dojo)
Monday: Cubs 4:15pm, Little Lions 5:00pm, Juniors Beg 5:45pm, Int-Adv 6:30pm, Teens & Adults 7:15pm
Tuesday: Little Lions 4:15pm, Juniors Beg 5:00pm, Int-Adv 5:45pm, Teens 6:30pm, Adults 7:15pm
Wednesday: Cubs 4:15pm, Little Lions 5:00pm, Juniors Beg 5:45pm, Int-Adv 6:30pm, Teens & Adults 7:15pm
Thursday: Little Lions 4:15pm, Juniors Beg 5:00pm, Int-Adv 5:45pm, Teens & Adults 6:30pm
Saturday: Cubs 8:00am, Little Lions 8:45am, Juniors 9:30am, Combined 10:15am, Teens & Adults 11:00am

## Free Trial
All programs offer a free first lesson. Book online at https://www.kansaikarategoldcoast.com.au

## Service Area
Upper Coomera, Coomera, Pimpama, Ormeau, Oxenford, Helensvale, Pacific Pines,
Hope Island, Maudsland, northern Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia.
